coach.title: Chat
coach.name: Loggy
coach.workoutGenerationPrompt: I can help you create a personalized workout plan! Tell me about your goals, available equipment, and how many days per week you'd like to train.
coach.analyzeProgressPrompt: I'll analyze your recent workouts. Any remarks you'd like to tell me before I do?
coach.nutritionCheckPrompt: I'll review your nutrition for the last 7 days. Any remarks you'd like to add before I do?
coach.trackMealPrompt: Tell me what you've eaten (you can even send a photo!), and I'll estimate the macros and track it for you.
coach.welcomeMessage: Hello. My name is Loggy, I am your AI Fitness Coach. I'm here to help you achieve your fitness goals, track your progress, and provide personalized guidance. Feel free to ask me anything about workouts, nutrition, or your fitness journey!

errors.aiNotConfigured: AI features are not configured. Please add a Gemini or OpenAI API key in Settings.
errors.workoutGenerationFailed: Sorry, I couldn't generate a workout plan. Please try again.
errors.generalError: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.progressInsightFailed: Could not analyze progress. Try again later.
errors.nutritionInsightFailed: Could not check nutrition. Try again later.
errors.trackMealFailed: I couldn't estimate the macros for that meal. Could you describe it in more detail?
errors.filePickFailed: Failed to pick file. Please try again.

success.trackMealSuccess: I've tracked {{count}} ingredients for your meal: {{ingredients}}. Total: {{calories}} kcal.
success.trackMealReady: I've analyzed {{count}} meal(s): {{meals}} ({{calories}} kcal total). Tap a meal to review and log it!

aiInstructions.parseWorkouts: Parse the workouts and return the structured list.
aiInstructions.parseNutrition: Parse the nutrition data and return the structured list.
aiInstructions.parseRetrospectiveNutrition: Parse the meals and return the structured list.
aiInstructions.generateWorkoutPlanWithHistory: Generate a workout plan based on this conversation.
aiInstructions.generateWorkoutPlanDefault: Generate a basic weekly workout plan (e.g. 3-day split).

chatMessages.title: Chat Messages
chatMessages.createMessageDesc: Add a new message to the history

menu.title: Chat options
menu.clearHistoryDesc: Delete all messages in this conversation context.
menu.shareHistoryDesc: Export this whole conversation as plain text.

confirmClear.title: Clear chat history?
confirmClear.message: This will permanently delete all messages in this conversation context. This cannot be undone.

share.title: Chat with Loggy
share.noMessages: There is no chat history to share yet.
share.failed: Failed to share chat history. Please try again.

message.deleteDesc: Remove this message from the conversation
